name: Crouton Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Spread the croutons on the bottom of the pie plate.
3. Distribute the salmon over the croutons and sprinkle with parsley and green peppers to taste.
4. In a bowl, beat the eggs with milk, nutmeg, and cayenne pepper using a fork until well combined.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the salmon.
6. Sprinkle the grated Mozzarella cheese on top.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 425°F (220°C).
8. Reduce the temperature to 375°F (190°C) and bake for another 20 minutes or until golden brown and firm.
9. Serve, if desired.
